analysis:
【今日摘要】
今日市場情緒複雜，多個因素影響股價走勢。聯邦儲備理事會維持利率不變，但暗示未來可能會提高利率，對大銀行股價產生影響。道瓊未來指數下跌，Nvidia領導5檔芯片股近買點。谷歌股價雙倍大漲，原因是公司生長速度太快，無法以目前的速度建造新設施。微軟在中國建立十億美元級人工智慧業務，透過Azure向當地主要科技公司供應OpenAI模型。美國與伊朗簽署協議，標誌著中東戰爭的結束，地區經濟開始恢復。日本核心通膨率五月持續不變，符合預期儘管能源價格擔憂。

【結語】
投資者應該謹慎評估市場情緒和風險。今日市場情緒複雜，投資者應該保持冷靜，避免被市場波動所影響。投資者應該根據自己的投資目標和風險承受能力進行投資決策。投資市場的風險和不確定性永遠存在，投資者應該保持警惕和謹慎。

【精選個股】
NVDA - NVIDIA - Nvidia領導5檔芯片股近買點。
GOOGL - Alphabet - 股價雙倍大漲，仍然是值得投資的選擇。
MSFT - 微軟 - 在中國建立十億美元級人工智慧業務，透過Azure向當地主要科技公司供應OpenAI模型。

風險提醒：投資市場的風險和不確定性永遠存在，投資者應該保持警惕和謹慎。

items.title: The Fed Just Made Its First Decision Under Kevin Warsh. Here's What It Means for Big Bank Stocks.
items.summary: The Federal Reserve just held rates steady, with a hint that rate hikes could be in the cards.
items.zh_title: 聯邦儲備理事會首次在凱文沃許領導下做出決定。對大銀行股價的影響
items.zh_point: 聯邦儲備理事會決定維持利率不變，但暗示未來可能會提高利率。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall; Nvidia Leads 5 Stocks Near Buy Points, SpaceX Needs This
items.summary: The stock market rose in a wild week, led by AI. Nvidia leads five chips near buy points. SpaceX stock needs this.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數下跌；Nvidia領導5檔芯片股近買點，SpaceX股需要這個
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數下跌，Nvidia領導5檔芯片股近買點，SpaceX股需要這個。

items.title: Google Has The Best Problem Money Can’t Quite Buy
items.summary: Alphabet’s stock doubled for one simple reason: it’s growing so fast that it literally cannot build fast enough to keep up.
items.zh_title: 谷歌的最佳困境：錢買不到的速度
items.zh_point: 谷歌的股價雙倍大漲，原因是公司生長速度太快，無法以目前的速度建造新設施，讓股價不斷上漲。

items.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Is Building A Billion Dollar AI Business In China
items.summary: Microsoft (NasdaqGS:MSFT) is building a large AI and cloud business in China, supplying OpenAI models through Azure to major local technology companies. ByteDance is reported to spend over US$1b annually on Microsoft AI and cloud services, with Ant Group, Meituan, and Tencent also using Microsoft models. Microsoft has emerged as a key provider of OpenAI technology in China at a time when several US competitors are not active in the region. For investors watching Microsoft, this growing AI...
items.zh_title: 微軟在中國建立十億美元級人工智慧業務
items.zh_point: 微軟正在中國建立一大型人工智慧和雲端業務，透過Azure向當地主要科技公司供應OpenAI模型。字節跳動已經花費超過十億美元每年購買微軟的人工智慧和雲端服務，蚂蚁集團、美團和騰訊也使用微軟模型。微軟在中國成為OpenAI技術的關鍵供應商，同時許多美國競爭對手在該地區不活躍。

items.title: The 1 Tech Stock I'd Buy With My Eyes Closed at Today's Prices
items.summary: Alphabet stock is up 16% this year, but is badly underperforming other tech stocks.
items.zh_title: 我會毫不猶豫地買入這一隻科技股
items.zh_point: 我認為在今天的價格下，Alphabet 股票仍然是值得投資的選擇。儘管今年已經上漲 16%，但它仍然落後於其他科技股的表現。

items.title: Why Japan's $70 billion-plus intervention and a rate hike didn't prop up the yen more
items.summary: Japan was willing to step in to defend the yen around the 160 level before, and it's at that point again.
items.zh_title: 為何日本70億美元以上介入與升息仍未能支撐日圓
items.zh_point: 日本再次出手干預日圓，試圖防止其貶值，但效果不佳。

items.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
items.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
items.zh_title: 川普稱伊朗協議是「無條件投降」，說他的權力「無限」：Axios
items.zh_point: 川普在與Axios的採訪中表示，他與伊朗達成協議的目的是防止伊朗問題引發全球大蕭條。

items.title: U.S.-Iran deal in photos: ships in the Strait of Hormuz, daily life in Tehran
items.summary: The first signs of a post-war recovery are emerging across the Middle East after the United States and Iran signed a memorandum aimed at ending the conflict.
items.zh_title: 美國與伊朗達成協議：霍爾木茲海峽的船隻與德黑蘭的日常生活
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗簽署協議，標誌著中東戰爭的結束，地區經濟開始恢復。

items.title: South Korea's Kospi extends record run as Asia markets open mixed; Samsung, SK Hynix hit all-time highs
items.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to trade mixed on Friday as investors assessed the durability of a U.S.-brokered peace agreement with Iran.
items.zh_title: 韓國Kospi連續上漲破紀錄，亞洲市場開盤盤整；三星、SK Hynix創下歷史新高
items.zh_point: 韓國股市Kospi持續上漲，亞洲市場開盤盤整，投資者正在評估美國與伊朗簽署和平協議的持久性。

items.title: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns
items.summary: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.
items.zh_title: 日本核心通膨率五月持續不變，符合預期儘管能源價格擔憂
items.zh_point: 日本五月核心通膨率持續不變，達1.8%，能源價格擔憂未能對通膨率造成重大影響。

items.title: This AI company wants to replace MRIs with a 60-second dip in the spa. Can that really work?
items.summary: Midjourney is making a foray into healthcare with its latest body-scanner product, aiming to make medical imaging more accessible.
items.zh_title: 這家AI公司想用60秒的SPA泡澡取代MRI掃描，真的能夠成功嗎？
items.zh_point: Midjourney推出最新的身體掃描產品，試圖使醫學影像技術更為普及。

items.title: I’m 55 and retiring in 6 years. Should I be switching to Roth 401(k) contributions now?
items.summary: People are still holding back on participating in Roth plans at work, Vanguard says.
items.zh_title: 我55歲，六年後退休。該不該現在轉換為羅斯401(k)貢獻？
items.zh_point: 羅斯401(k)貢獻仍未被充分利用，金剛證券表示。

items.title: Trump’s Iran agreement is a massive buy signal for stocks
items.summary: Hyperventilating experts were wrong about the Iran war. The end of the conflict is a massive buy signal for stocks.
items.zh_title: 川普的伊朗協議是股市的大買賣信號
items.zh_point: 伊朗戰爭的結束，讓原本預測戰爭爆發的專家們錯了，現在這是股市的大買賣時機。

items.title: SpaceX is vastly more expensive than any stock in the S&P 500, fueled by ‘FOMO’ mentality
items.summary: Billions of dollars have flowed into SpaceX ETFs as retail investors look past conventional valuations.
items.zh_title: SpaceX的成本遠遠超過S&P 500的任何股票，受「恐懼買入」心理的驅使
items.zh_point: SpaceX的ETF吸引了大量零售投資者，忽視傳統的估值標準。

items.title: Intel’s stock jumps 11% — even as analysts say new Apple chip deal might start small
items.summary: Intel “is steadily expanding its domestic capacity and converting political and strategic tailwinds into concrete foundry wins,” an analyst says.
items.zh_title: 英特爾股價大漲 11% — 分析師認為與蘋果合作可能只是開始
items.zh_point: 英特爾正逐步擴大本土生產能力，轉化政治和戰略利益為實質的晶圓代工勝利。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下跌，受中國DeepSeek事件影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大幅下跌，Nasdaq指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，Nvidia股價下跌16%，其他AI相關股價也遭受重創。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所黃金、白銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所黃金價格下跌 1.4%，連續兩天下跌；白銀價格下跌 2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國的DeepSeek AI要點
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，且成本低廉，並不需要使用最先進的晶片。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深海探索不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價大幅下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與電信周報：市場話題
items.zh_point: 深入探討DeepSeek、SoFi等科技、媒體和電信領域的市場動態。

items.title: Hyundai to buy SoftBank’s remaining stake in Boston Dynamics for $325 million, newspaper says
